legal_notice.title: ⚠️ AI Near-Miss Report — Sovereign Trace Protocol
content: A near-miss is an AI output that could have caused harm but was
caught before impact. Sealing it now — before internal review,
before remediation, before any pressure to minimize — is the
epistemic act. The record is permanent from this moment.
**This template does not require a completed failure.**
It requires honest documentation of what almost happened.

fields.label: Organization Name
fields.description: Legal name of the organization filing this report.

fields.label: AI System Identifier
fields.description: Model name, version, or internal system identifier.

fields.label: Deployment Domain
fields.description: Where was this AI system operating?

fields.label: Near-Miss Description
fields.description: Describe exactly what the AI system output or action was, and what harm could have resulted if it had not been caught. Be specific. Vague entries do not produce useful sealed records.
fields.placeholder: The AI system recommended a medication dosage of 500mg for a patient with documented renal impairment. The correct dose is 50mg. The error was caught by a pharmacist before administration. No harm occurred. The AI was operating on a patient record that lacked the renal flag in the field it was reading.

fields.label: Input / Prompt That Produced the Near-Miss
fields.description: Exact input, query, or trigger. Copy
